The '''GX12 Hovervan''' was produced by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] as a personnel carrier for [[Security Police/Legends|Espos]].

==Characteristics==
This heavily armed and armored [[Hovervan/Legends|hovervan]] was designed for open combat and used when Espo forces faced off against a legitimate threat. It is often called "portable bunker" by civilians. A turret-mounted [[Atgar SpaceDefense Corporation/Legends|Atgar]] twin [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] able to hit targets 1,500 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] distant and forward [[grenade mortar]] with a range of 300 meters provided covering fire as Espo troops quickly disembarked out of side folding hatches. Front and rear-mounted rotating [[Spotlight/Legends|spotlights]] and nosepiece [[Infrared receptor|infrared sensor]] allowed for effective targeting during low-visibility conditions.<ref name="HSCS" />

The hovervan's passenger compartment had room for 16 troops along with a [[Medic/Legends|medic]] and [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B surgical droid]]. Both pilot and [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]] sat in the forward cabin, which featured a retractable [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] canopy. There was no room to accommodate prisoners however, requiring a [[JX40 Jailspeeder]] to accompany the hovervan.<ref name="HSCS" />
